annotator_1.text: CRAFT hand is a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance.
annotator_1.source_quote: We introduce CRAFT hand, a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.

annotator_1.text: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid.
annotator_1.source_quote: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid

annotator_1.text: CRAFT uses rolling-contact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths.
annotator_1.source_quote: uses rollingcontact joint surfaces to keep flexion on repeatable motion paths

annotator_1.text: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons.
annotator_1.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons

annotator_1.text: CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.
annotator_1.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

annotator_1.text: CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items.
annotator_1.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items

annotator_1.text: The hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy.
annotator_1.source_quote: the hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy

annotator_2.text: CRAFT hand is a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.
annotator_2.source_quote: We introduce CRAFT hand, a tendon-driven anthropomorphic hand with hybrid hard-soft compliance for contact-rich manipulation.

annotator_2.text: Impacts concentrate at joints in hand contact.
annotator_2.source_quote: Impacts concentrate at joints, while links carry most of the load.

annotator_2.text: Links carry most of the load in hand contact.
annotator_2.source_quote: Impacts concentrate at joints, while links carry most of the load.

annotator_2.text: CRAFT places soft material at joints.
annotator_2.source_quote: CRAFT places soft material at joints and keeps links rigid

annotator_2.text: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the CRAFT hand through tendons.
annotator_2.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons

annotator_2.text: The motor mounting configuration keeps the form factor compact.
annotator_2.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons, keeping the form factor compact and the fingers light.

annotator_2.text: The motor mounting configuration keeps the fingers light.
annotator_2.source_quote: Fifteen motors mounted on the fingers drive the hand through tendons, keeping the form factor compact and the fingers light.

annotator_2.text: CRAFT improves strength compared to baseline in structural tests.
annotator_2.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

annotator_2.source_quote: In structural tests, CRAFT improves strength and endurance while maintaining comparable repeatability.

annotator_2.text: CRAFT maintains comparable repeatability in structural tests.

annotator_2.text: CRAFT improves handling of fragile items in teleoperation.
annotator_2.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items

annotator_2.text: CRAFT improves handling of low-friction items in teleoperation.
annotator_2.source_quote: In teleoperation, CRAFT improves handling of fragile and low-friction items

annotator_2.text: CRAFT hand covers 33 out of 33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy.
annotator_2.source_quote: the hand covers 33/33 grasps in the Feix taxonomy

annotator_2.text: The full design of CRAFT costs under $600.
The CRAFT design will be released open-source.
annotator_2.source_quote: will be released open-source with visionbased teleoperation and simulation integration
